product: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 now available as a Databricks-hosted model
tagline: Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 as a Databricks hosted model.
what_it_does: Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 as a Databricks hosted model. Designed for coding, agentic workflows, and professional work at scale, Claude Sonnet 5 delivers near Opus level intelligence with Sonnet's cost efficiency and speed. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs.
why_it_matters: Designed for coding, agentic workflows, and professional work at scale, Claude Sonnet 5 delivers near Opus level intelligence with Sonnet's cost efficiency and speed.
key_takeaway: Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 as a Databricks hosted model.
